name: seed
description: Standalone idea-shaping skill that turns rough concepts into reviewed specs and stops before implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Shape vague ideas into reviewed specs, then stop
interface.longDescription: Use Seed to clarify intent, compare approaches, write a spec to docs/seed/, review it with the user, and stop before implementation planning or code.
defaultPrompt: I have an idea I want to think through first.
Help me turn this rough feature idea into a spec.
